summary: Session 1: flattened the Work Explorer module subtree per the module-lifecycle-simplification verdict - the 093-era persistent Plan / Session sets child nodes, the blocked-until-plan state, deriveModuleChildren, and the planExists plumbing are removed; status buckets are the module's direct children (ARIA module 1 / bucket 2 / row 3); kind-typed set rows (Set 098 kind field) render a quiet presentation-only badge via new pure kindBadge/kindTooltip model functions; the scaffolded decomposition set's prerequisite blocked-marker carries the plan gate, pinned end-to-end incl. unblock-on-plan-complete. Layer 2 + Layer 3 pins moved in the same session (093 amendment-6 discipline); compat-matrix row updated with the renamed pinning test. Suites green: unit 1588 (stub path), Playwright Layer 3 26/26 effective (one self-introduced assertion corrected mid-session), ai_router pytest 3030/6 skipped unchanged. Cross-provider phased discovery round 1: VERIFIED on both fan-out calls, zero findings; two prose/test nits folded in (UAT walk toggle-click acknowledged; blocked-tooltip pin upgraded to exact-string). UAT/E2E suggested: suggestion_disposition 'both' recorded per the spec's operator-authored arming comments; 3-walk ad-hoc UAT checklist compiled at the 078/087-S3 bar (optional, non-gating). Known consequence recorded: Set 093 S1's pending UAT walks are superseded by this reversal. No version bump, no publish - single release boundary after Set 101.

reason.specifics: Routed analysis (s1-next-set-analysis.json, gemini-pro): Session 2 is low-variance wiring of already-shipped writers and seams (Set 099 rename/delete, Set 098 scaffold, the 093 targeting seam), well within Sonnet at a large cost reduction from Fable 5 while retaining depth for the terminal session's advisory path-aware critique; anthropic orchestration keeps the openai/google verification pool free.
